description_long: This is a gasoline-powered chainsaw with a robust orange plastic housing and a long, toothed metal cutting bar. The body features a prominent black wrap-around handle at the top and a secondary handle at the rear for secure two-handed operation. The left side displays a visible safety guard and chain brake lever, as well as a warning label near the bar. The right side shows a circular cap, likely for fuel or oil, and additional venting for engine cooling. The cutting chain is metallic with sharp, evenly spaced teeth, and the bar is marked with safety and operational symbols. The overall design is utilitarian, with ergonomic features and safety mechanisms integrated for urban or residential use.
description: A bright orange gasoline chainsaw with a long metal cutting bar, black ergonomic handles, and visible safety features. The design is robust and functional, suitable for heavy-duty cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cutting bar and chain extending outward, with the top and rear handles visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange housing, safety guard, warning label, and the full length of the cutting bar and chain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear handle, top handle, and the back of the housing, with the bar extending forward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the circular cap (likely for fuel or oil), venting, and the full bar with safety markings.
attribute_brand_logo: A logo with the text 'SAWIT' is visible on the left side of the housing, in blue letters.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a black wrap-around top handle and a rear handle, both ergonomically shaped for grip and control.
attribute_power_source_indicator: A circular cap on the right side indicates a gasoline power source.
